2604.09377.title: Task-Aware LLM Routing with Multi-Level Task-Profile-Guided Data Synthesis for Cold-Start Scenarios
2604.09377.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) exhibit substantial variability in performance and computational cost across tasks and queries, motivating routing systems that select models to meet user-specific cost-performance trade-offs. However, existing routers generalize poorly in cold-start scenarios where in-domain training data is unavailable. We address this limitation with a multi-level task-profile-guided data synthesis framework that constructs a hierarchical task taxonomy and produces diverse question-answer pairs to approximate the test-time query distribution. Building on this, we introduce TRouter, a task-type-aware router approach that models query-conditioned cost and performance via latent task-type variables, with prior regularization derived from the synthesized task taxonomy. This design enhances TRouter's routing utility under both cold-start and in-domain settings. Across multiple benchmarks, we show that our synthesis framework alleviates cold-start issues and that TRouter delivers effective LLM routing.
2604.09377.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）在各種任務和查詢中的性能和計算成本表現出顯著的變異性，這促使了選擇模型以滿足用戶特定成本-性能權衡的路由系統的發展。<lb/>然而，現有的路由器在冷啟動情境中表現不佳，因為在這種情況下無法獲得域內訓練數據。<lb/>我們通過一個多層次任務輪廓引導的數據合成框架來解決這一限制，該框架構建了一個層次化的任務分類法並生成多樣的問題-答案對，以近似測試時的查詢分佈。<lb/>在此基礎上，我們引入了TRouter，一種任務類型感知的路由器方法，通過潛在的任務類型變量來建模查詢條件下的成本和性能，並從合成的任務分類法中導出先前的正則化。<lb/>這一設計增強了TRouter在冷啟動和域內設置下的路由效用。<lb/>在多個基準測試中，我們顯示我們的合成框架緩解了冷啟動問題，並且TRouter提供了有效的LLM路由。
2604.09377.author: Hui Liu et.al.
2604.09377.authors: Hui Liu, Bin Zou, Kecheng Chen, Jie Liu, Wenya Wang, Haoliang Li
